meta.title: AI Dev 25 | Bilge Yücel: Building and Deploying Agentic Workflows with Haystack
meta.description:
Building an AI agent is exciting—but taking it from prototype to production requires more than just an LLM. In this talk, Bilge Yücel, Developer Relations Engineer at deepset, walks through how to design, build, and deploy agentic pipelines using the open-source Haystack framework.

Bilge covers how to:
– Structure agent workflows with modular, scalable components
– Integrate tool-calling for real-world functionality
– Use deepset Studio to visualize, test, and refine your pipeline before deploying

Whether you're experimenting or preparing to launch agentic systems at scale, this session offers practical strategies to help you build confidently—with performance and adaptability in mind.

Keep building,
DeepLearning.AI
